title: Spicy Juicy Indian Chicken Kebabs
description: A nostalgic Indian dish featuring marinated chicken, candied peel, and a blend of spices, grilled to perfection. This kosher-friendly recipe is perfect for a spicy and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, ghee or oil, garam masala, cumin, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix until the chicken is well coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, sprinkle the chopped candied orange peel over the kebabs.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional candied orange peel if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
